MODULE: cosmos.dex.dex_proxy
FILE: cosmos/dex/dex_proxy.py (88 lines)
CATEGORY: dex

DESCRIPTION: DEXAI Proxy - Forward /dex and /DEXAI requests to the DEXAI Node.js server on port 3847.

Usage in server.py:
    from Cosmos.dex.dex_proxy import register_dex_routes
    register_dex_routes(app)

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def register_dex_routes(app)
